game_name: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain
description: Full PC keyboard+mouse bindings for MGSV:TPP (PC default layout).
game_context: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain (MGS5/MGSV). You are Big Boss (Snake) infiltrating enemy outposts on foot. Enemies wear military uniforms and carry weapons. When they spot you a red ! appears. Run with W, sprint by holding Shift while running (Shift+W), move backward S, strafe A/D. Press C to toggle crouch/prone (crouch to hide and recover health). Press Space for a quick dive/dodge. Aim with Right Mouse Button, shoot with Left Mouse Button. Reload with R. Interact with objects/NPCs using E. Camera controls where Snake looks; pan it left/right to see around obstacles. Goal: eliminate visible enemies, avoid patrols, reach objectives. Never stand still in the open.

named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_FORWARD: Shift+W — sprint straight ahead. Use when path is clear and no enemies visible.
named_action_descriptions.RUN_FORWARD: W — run forward normally. Use for careful movement in semi-open areas.
named_action_descriptions.RUN_BACKWARD: S — run backward. Use to retreat slightly while keeping eyes forward.
named_action_descriptions.STRAFE_LEFT: A — sidestep left. Use to step around a wall or obstacle on the right.
named_action_descriptions.STRAFE_RIGHT: D — sidestep right. Use to step around a wall or obstacle on the left.
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_LOOK_RIGHT: Shift+W + camera right — sprint and pan camera right. Use to curve right or scan right while running.
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_LOOK_LEFT: Shift+W + camera left — sprint and pan camera left. Use to curve left or scan left while running.
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_LOOK_UP: Shift+W + camera up — sprint and tilt up. Use to check high ground or windows while running.
named_action_descriptions.RUN_LOOK_RIGHT: W + camera right — run and pan right. Use for slower, controlled movement around a right-side obstacle.
named_action_descriptions.RUN_LOOK_LEFT: W + camera left — run and pan left. Use for slower, controlled movement around a left-side obstacle.
named_action_descriptions.LOOK_RIGHT_BIG: Big camera sweep RIGHT (160px). Use when a wall is blocking the path — sweep to find the open route on the right.
named_action_descriptions.LOOK_LEFT_BIG: Big camera sweep LEFT (160px). Use when a wall is blocking the path — sweep to find the open route on the left.
named_action_descriptions.LOOK_RIGHT: Camera pan right (90px). Use to peek right from cover, scan right for enemies, or adjust view.
named_action_descriptions.LOOK_LEFT: Camera pan left (90px). Use to peek left from cover, scan left for enemies, or adjust view.
named_action_descriptions.LOOK_UP: Tilt camera up. Use to check rooftops, windows, or elevated enemy positions.
named_action_descriptions.LOOK_DOWN: Tilt camera down. Use to check the ground ahead or look for prone enemies.
named_action_descriptions.CROUCH_TOGGLE: C — toggle crouch/prone. Use to hide behind cover, lower profile, or slowly recover health.
named_action_descriptions.CROUCH_RUN_FORWARD: C then W — go crouch then move forward. Use to move stealthily through open areas.
named_action_descriptions.QUICK_DIVE: Space — instant dive/dodge roll. Use ONLY when bullets are hitting near you or an enemy is about to fire.
named_action_descriptions.EVADE_RIGHT: Sprint + hard camera right — break away to the right. Use to escape gunfire by sprinting right.
named_action_descriptions.EVADE_LEFT: Sprint + hard camera left — break away to the left. Use to escape gunfire by sprinting left.
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_BACKWARD: Shift+S — sprint backward fast. Use to create distance from a close enemy.
named_action_descriptions.AIM_SHOOT: Right-click (aim) then left-click (fire) — single shot. Use when enemy is clearly visible in front.
named_action_descriptions.AIM_BURST: Aim then fire 3 shots. Use against stationary or close-range targets for maximum damage.
named_action_descriptions.AIM_SHOOT_STRAFE_RIGHT: Aim+fire while strafing D (right). Use to fire at an enemy while side-stepping right to dodge their shots.
named_action_descriptions.AIM_SHOOT_STRAFE_LEFT: Aim+fire while strafing A (left). Use to fire at an enemy while side-stepping left to dodge their shots.
named_action_descriptions.RELOAD_WEAPON: R — reload magazine. Use ONLY when ammo counter shows 0 or is critically low.
named_action_descriptions.INTERACT: E — context action. Use ONLY when an on-screen prompt (E icon) is visible near an object, door, or NPC.
named_action_descriptions.USE_BINOCULARS: F (hold) — equip binoculars to scout ahead. Use in safe areas to tag enemies before approaching.
named_action_descriptions.DO_NOTHING: No input. Use ONLY during cutscenes, loading screens, menus, or dialogues.

action_descriptions.EXPLORE: No enemies visible — move and scan
action_descriptions.EVADE: Taking fire — dodge or sprint away
